text.tspan: The interlinked form at the core of the Tumirails symbol is a visual
expression of how the platform works at a system level. Made up of
distinct yet connected segments, it represents decentralized energy
trading where households and solar prosumers remain independent but
are securely linked through a shared marketplace.
The interlocking geometry refects network connectivity, showing how
consumers, prosumers, and installers are brought together into one
coordinated ecosystem where energy, data, and trust fow seamlessly.
At the same time, the way the forms pass through one another symbolizes
marketplace exchange of energy: a continuous, two-way movement of
energy and value rather than a one-directional supply model.
